file_insights.changes: Complete replacement of previous content with comprehensive test outcome documentation (61 lines)
file_insights.key_findings: Documents successful prompt template verification and build quality checks (447 tests, zero clippy warnings), with disk space exhaustion (890Gi/926Gi) identified as environmental blocker preventing claude adapter smoke test execution

file_insights.changes: Subtask-1-7 status transitioned from 'pending' to 'completed' with detailed notes
file_insights.key_findings: Notes capture conditional task logic: skipped subtasks 1-3 through 1-5 because blocker was environmental (disk) not test failure (prompt-related)

patterns_discovered.description: Result documentation follows consistent format: Summary → Test Execution Status (with subsections for Completed/Blocked/Skipped) → Acceptance Criteria table → Recommendations → Conclusion
patterns_discovered.significance: Enables clear communication of partial success scenarios

patterns_discovered.pattern: Conditional task branching based on root cause
patterns_discovered.description: If test blocked by environment (disk), conditional retry subtasks (1-3 through 1-5) are skipped; if test failed due to prompt, those subtasks would execute
patterns_discovered.significance: Avoids unnecessary work when environmental issues prevent test execution

patterns_discovered.description: Build quality checks (make check) passed successfully, but actual adapter test blocked by resource constraint
patterns_discovered.significance: Identifies need for disk space pre-flight checks

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Disk space exhaustion as test blocker
gotchas_discovered.context: 890Gi/926Gi used (341Mi free); prevents Nushell command execution in temp directory
gotchas_discovered.impact: Primary acceptance criterion (claude adapter smoke test) could not be executed despite all preparation succeeding
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Requires 10GB+ disk space cleanup; not a code defect

gotchas_discovered.context: Subtask-1-1 verification confirmed prompt explicitly states 'Use the Write tool to create files. Create the output/ directory first if needed.'
gotchas_discovered.impact: No prompt modifications required; future test runs should not fail due to incomplete instructions
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Test failure (if any) will not be prompt-related

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Conditional tasks rendered non-applicable by environment
gotchas_discovered.context: Subtasks 1-3, 1-4, 1-5 designed to handle test failures from prompt issues; disk blocker short-circuited them
gotchas_discovered.impact: Cannot validate prompt-related retry logic without successfully executing the primary test
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Retry logic will be testable once disk space is freed

completed_deliverables: output/result.md created with comprehensive test outcome documentation
implementation_plan.json updated with completion status and detailed notes
Build quality verification (make check) passed: 447 tests, 0 failures, zero clippy warnings
blocked_deliverables: Claude adapter smoke test execution blocked by disk space (890Gi/926Gi used)
skipped_deliverables: Conditional retry subtasks 1-3, 1-4, 1-5 (not applicable due to environmental blocker, not test failure)
approach_outcome.quality_gates: All codebase quality gates passed; environmental constraint prevented acceptance criterion validation

recommendations.action: Free at least 10GB disk space to unblock claude adapter smoke test
recommendations.rationale: Environmental constraint (341Mi free on 926Gi) prevents test execution; no code issues detected

recommendations.action: Re-run spec 016 or create new spec after disk cleanup to execute claude adapter test
recommendations.rationale: Primary acceptance criterion requires successful adapter test execution; prompt template already correct so test should pass on re-run

recommendations.action: Add disk space validation to pre-flight checks before running adapter tests
recommendations.rationale: Prevents wasted time on specs that will fail due to resource constraints; requires <5% free disk to be considered available

recommendations.action: Document environmental prereqs (disk space, memory, network) in adapter test specs
recommendations.rationale: Clarifies why tests may be blocked and guides troubleshooting when specs fail
